A '''Blackout''' was a type of weapon designed by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]]. The [[Yarkora/Legends|Yarkoran]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Sheryc Seka]] sold difficult to find hardware, which included a Blackout with a triple-sling and custom fit by a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]].<ref name="Rough and Tundra" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
